# OROSTONE — Premium Sintered Stone Surfaces

> OROSTONE is a Slovak premium supplier of sintered stone (sinterovaný kameň) for kitchen countertops, bathroom vanities, wall cladding, and architectural projects. Based in Bratislava, Slovakia. We provide end-to-end service: expert consultation, digital laser templating (±0.05mm precision), CNC diamond fabrication, in-house A-frame transport, and certified professional installation. All projects completed in 10–15 working days.

> For the full, detailed version of this document (product specs, FAQs, legal details), see: https://orostone.sk/llms-full.txt

## Key Facts

- Sintered stone is 100% mineral material sintered at 1,200°C without resins
- Withstands temperatures up to 300°C, UV radiation, acids, and scratches
- Near-zero porosity (under 0.1%) — stain-proof without sealing
- Available in 3mm (cladding), 12mm (standard), and 20mm (premium countertops)
- Mohs hardness 6–7, breaking force up to 16,000N for 20mm slabs
- Popular finishes: matte, polished, leather/textured

## Product Catalog — 12 Large-Format Slab Designs

### 01. STATUARIO DIAMANTE
- URL: https://orostone.sk/produkt/statuario-diamante
- Pure white elegance with dramatic silver-grey veining inspired by premium Italian marble. Large-format porcelain slabs eliminate grout lines for an uninterrupted luxury surface. Exceptional resistance to scratches, moisture, and stains. Ideal for luxury bathrooms, living rooms, and entrance halls in Bratislava.
- Keywords: statuario diamante, biely mramor obklad, veľkoformátové platne bratislava, luxusné obklady

### 02. CALACATTA TOP
- URL: https://orostone.sk/produkt/calacatta-top
- Warm golden-brown veining on a brilliant white base — the pinnacle of Italian stone craftsmanship. Calacatta pattern is one of the most exclusive marble designs in the world. Proven to increase property value. No impregnation needed. Perfect for kitchen islands, bathroom walls, and floors in Bratislava premium developments.
- Keywords: calacatta obklad, calacatta mramor platne, luxusné dlažby bratislava, kuchynský obklad calacatta

### 03. GIVENCHY GOLD
- URL: https://orostone.sk/produkt/givenchy-gold
- Inspired by haute couture, warm gold-ochre tones with delicate veining create a five-star hotel atmosphere. Seamless large-format slabs optically enlarge spaces. Acid and stain resistant. Pairs beautifully with matte black hardware and natural wood. An investment in lifestyle, not just a wall covering.
- Keywords: givenchy gold obklad, zlaté mramorové platne, luxusné interiéry bratislava, zlatý dizajn podlahy

### 04. ROMAN TRAVERTINE
- URL: https://orostone.sk/produkt/roman-travertine
- Timeless beauty of Roman architecture captured in a ceramic slab. Warm cream-to-beige tones with authentic travertine texture create a welcoming Mediterranean atmosphere. Suitable for both interior and exterior (terraces, balconies). No impregnation required unlike natural travertine. Popular among Bratislava architects for villas and premium apartments.
- Keywords: travertín obklad, travertínové platne bratislava, béžové dlažby, stredomorský interiér

### 05. TAJ MAHAL
- URL: https://orostone.sk/produkt/taj-mahal
- Creamy-white base with delicate golden veining — a serene, spa-like luxury that never goes out of style. Perfect for bathrooms where you want to feel pampered every morning. Favored by architects working on high-end Bratislava residential projects. Durable porcelain slab lasts decades without losing its beauty.
- Keywords: taj mahal obklad, krémový mramor, spa kúpeľňa obklad, mramorové platne bratislava

### 06. APPENNINO
- URL: https://orostone.sk/produkt/appennino
- The wild beauty of Italian Apennine mountains. Dynamic veining with natural coloring makes each piece visually unique. Ideal as a statement accent wall, full bathroom, or exclusive kitchen island. Large-format slabs emphasize pattern continuity. Excellent choice for Bratislava lofts, high-ceiling apartments, and industrial-style spaces.
- Keywords: appennino obklad, prírodný kameň dizajn, akcentová stena obklad, veľkoformátové platne

### 07. ASTRANA GREY
- URL: https://orostone.sk/produkt/astrana-grey
- The definition of modern elegance. Subtle grey tones with discreet veining suit any interior style — from Scandinavian to Italian contemporary. Perfect for open-plan Bratislava apartments where one surface flows through living room, dining area, and kitchen. Easy to maintain, durable, and visually understated. Ideal for families.
- Keywords: sivé mramorové platne, astrana grey, moderné obklady bratislava, šedý mramor, sivé dlažby

### 08. SUPER WHITE EXTRA
- URL: https://orostone.sk/produkt/super-white-extra
- The ultimate answer to minimalism. Dazzling white brings light, purity, and absolute modernity to any space. Optically enlarges rooms — strategic choice for Bratislava apartments with limited natural light. Provides a perfect canvas for colorful accents, art, plants, and statement furniture. Maximum stain resistance with effortless daily cleaning.
- Keywords: biele mramorové platne, super white obklad, biele dlažby, minimalistický interiér platne

### 09. GOTHIC GOLD
- URL: https://orostone.sk/produkt/gothic-gold
- Deep dark base with fiery golden veining — dramatic beauty found in five-star hotels and private Bratislava villas. Wherever you place Gothic Gold, it becomes the undeniable focal point. Golden veins react fascinatingly to different lighting — candlelight creates romance, spotlights highlight dynamism. A bold choice for bold people.
- Keywords: gothic gold obklad, tmavé mramorové platne, zlaté žilky obklad, dark luxury interiér

### 10. WILD FOREST
- URL: https://orostone.sk/produkt/wild-forest
- The perfect bridge between biophilic design and modern living. Expressive patterns in grey-brown and warm earthy tones evoke deep forest stone surfaces. Popular in Bratislava new builds with panoramic windows. Pairs excellently with oak wood, green plants, and textured fabrics. Equally at home in wellness spaces, saunas, and freestanding bathtub bathrooms.
- Keywords: prírodný kameň obklad, wild forest platne, organický dizajn interiér, kamenné obklady bratislava

### 11. NERO MARGIUA
- URL: https://orostone.sk/produkt/nero-margiua
- Deep black with subtle silver-white veining — the ultimate statement of sophisticated taste. Creates unmistakable exclusivity in Bratislava penthouses, villas, and premium bathrooms. Equally impressive as an accent wall or full bathroom cladding. Contrasts perfectly with white sanitaryware, gold faucets, and wooden elements.
- Keywords: čierny mramor obklad, nero margiua, čierne mramorové platne, luxury čierna kúpeľňa

### 12. YABO WHITE
- URL: https://orostone.sk/produkt/yabo-white
- Purity in its most perfect form. Warm white with creamy undertones and subtle textures creates a welcoming yet always-current foundation. Works everywhere without exception — bathroom, hallway, kitchen. Porcelain technology ensures maximum hygiene and easy cleaning. A once-and-forever investment — because good taste doesn't age.
- Keywords: biele obklady bratislava, yabo white, teplé biele dlažby, krémová biela kúpeľňa

## Expert Blog Articles

- [Sintered Stone Problems Nobody Tells You](https://orostone.sk/blog/problemy-so-sinterovanym-kamenom): Comprehensive guide to chipping, cracking at cutouts, transport damage, and installation mistakes — with prevention techniques. Covers edge profiles (half-bullnose vs 90°), minimum 5mm corner radius for cutouts, two-pass cutting technique, and A-frame transport requirements.
- [Sintered Stone vs Quartz vs Ceramic vs Dekton](https://orostone.sk/blog/sinterovany-kamen-vs-kvarcit-vs-keramika-vs-dekton): Technical comparison of four premium countertop materials — composition, heat resistance, UV stability, price ranges, and decision tree for choosing the right material.
- [Matte vs Polished Surface: Which Looks More Luxurious?](https://orostone.sk/blog/matny-vs-leskly-povrch): Practical comparison of surface finishes — fingerprint visibility, micro-scratch behavior, photogenic qualities, and real-world recommendations for luxury kitchens.
- [From Measurement to Installation: The Orostone Process in 10 Steps](https://orostone.sk/blog/od-merania-po-instalaciu-proces-orostone): Complete walkthrough of the entire process — consultation, material selection, digital templating, CNC fabrication, quality control, transport, substrate preparation, installation, appliance fitting, and final inspection.
- [Is Sintered Stone Worth It? Price vs Lifespan vs Maintenance](https://orostone.sk/blog/oplati-sa-sinterovany-kamen): Financial analysis with 25-year total cost of ownership for three scenarios (family home, apartment, Airbnb) comparing sintered stone, quartz, granite, and laminate.

## Services

- Free no-obligation consultation and showroom visits
- Digital laser templating with ±0.05mm precision
- CNC diamond-tool fabrication (two-pass cutting standard)
- In-house transport in custom A-frame vehicles
- Professional installation by certified technicians
- Extended warranty and after-sales repair service
